selection_basis: The keyed development occurs after the source and follows through a defensible causal mechanism.
The answer requires historical knowledge beyond paraphrasing the excerpt.
The source is a law, policy announcement, resignation, or argument with a traceable downstream consequence.
Near-duplicate keyed developments are limited when a source offers stronger alternatives.

items.stem: The restriction in the excerpt most immediately encouraged employers in the West to respond by doing which of the following?
The policy established in the excerpt most directly contributed to which later characteristic of federal immigration policy?
The legislation in the excerpt most immediately led to legal disputes that were resolved in part through which development?
The mobilization foreshadowed in Roosevelt's excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following demographic developments?
The commitment Roosevelt describes in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following developments in the American economy?
The policy priorities expressed by Roosevelt in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following?
The mobilization for defense signaled in Roosevelt's excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following economic changes?
The vision of confronting external threats in Roosevelt's excerpt most directly contributed to which of the following developments in American foreign policy after 1945?
FDR's assertion that Americans should gain 'something better than mere survival' most immediately led to which postwar economic policy?
The policy established in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following economic outcomes in the late nineteenth century?
The opportunities created by the excerpt most immediately contributed to which of the following demographic developments in the late nineteenth century?
The settlement encouraged by the excerpt most immediately intensified which of the following conflicts in the American West?
The distribution of land described in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following environmental developments on the Great Plains?
The legislation described in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following developments in the decades following its passage?
The circumstances that led to the resignation announced in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following developments in the 1970s?
The resignation announced in the excerpt most immediately resulted in which of the following?
The scandal that led to the resignation in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which outcome in the 1976 presidential election?
By appealing directly to the 'silent majority' in the excerpt, Nixon most immediately sought a political effect that later contributed to which development?
The policy Nixon defended in this address most immediately led to which of the following developments?
The system for organizing territory established in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following?
The mechanism for admitting territories as states, as reflected in the excerpt, most directly contributed to which later political characteristic of the nation?
The precedent for governing new territory set in the excerpt most directly contributed to which later development?
The argument advanced in the excerpt most directly contributed to which later feature of American religious life?
The reasoning in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which broader trend in the early republic?
The ideas expressed in the excerpt most directly contributed to which later feature of American governance?
The diplomatic principles expressed in the excerpt most immediately contributed to which development at the war's conclusion?
The peace program outlined by Wilson in the excerpt most immediately led to which of the following?
The internationalist vision reflected in the excerpt most immediately led to which reaction in American foreign policy during the 1920s?
